'''ân-t-r''' ('''kanatar''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kneecap|kneecap]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-t-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kneecap|kneecap]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-t-r
|-
! Lemma
| kanatar
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinatar|thinatar]] || [[word:jinatar|jinatar]] || [[word:shinatar|shinatar]] || [[word:kinatar|kinatar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunatar|thuthunatar]] || [[word:jujunatar|jujunatar]] || [[word:shushunatar|shushunatar]] || [[word:kukunatar|kukunatar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunatar|thunatar]] || [[word:junatar|junatar]] || [[word:shunatar|shunatar]] || [[word:kunatar|kunatar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunatar|thunatar]] || [[word:junatar|junatar]] || [[word:shunatar|shunatar]] || [[word:kunatar|kunatar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenatar|thenatar]] || [[word:jenatar|jenatar]] || [[word:shenatar|shenatar]] || [[word:kenatar|kenatar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonatar|thothonatar]] || [[word:jojonatar|jojonatar]] || [[word:shoshonatar|shoshonatar]] || [[word:kokonatar|kokonatar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonatar|thonatar]] || [[word:jonatar|jonatar]] || [[word:shonatar|shonatar]] || [[word:konatar|konatar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonatar|thonatar]] || [[word:jonatar|jonatar]] || [[word:shonatar|shonatar]] || [[word:konatar|konatar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnatar|thĂŠnatar]] || [[word:jĂŠnatar|jĂŠnatar]] || [[word:shĂŠnatar|shĂŠnatar]] || [[word:kĂŠnatar|kĂŠnatar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanatar|thathanatar]] || [[word:jajanatar|jajanatar]] || [[word:shashanatar|shashanatar]] || [[word:kakanatar|kakanatar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanatar|thanatar]] || [[word:janatar|janatar]] || [[word:shanatar|shanatar]] || [[word:kanatar|kanatar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanatar|thanatar]] || [[word:janatar|janatar]] || [[word:shanatar|shanatar]] || [[word:kanatar|kanatar]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanatar|shanatar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanatar|goshanatar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanatar|gokishanatar]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanatarnĂŒ|shanatarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanatarnknĂŒ|goshanatarnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanatarnĂŒ|gokishanatarnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanatarshĂ«|shanatarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanatarnkshĂ«|goshanatarnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanatarshĂ«|gokishanatarshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanataro|shanataro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanatarnkro|goshanatarnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanataro|gokishanataro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanatarmu|shanatarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanatarnkmu|goshanatarnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanatarmu|gokishanatarmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanatarsher|shanatarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanatarnksher|goshanatarnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanatarsher|gokishanatarsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanatarng|shanatarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanatarnkng|goshanatarnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanatarng|gokishanatarng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanatarya|shanatarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanatarnkya|goshanatarnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanatarya|gokishanatarya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanataryam|shanataryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanatarnkyam|goshanatarnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanataryam|gokishanataryam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanatarnĂŒshĂ«|shanatarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanatarnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanatarnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanatarnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanatarnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanatarnĂŒro|shanatarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanatarnknĂŒro|goshanatarnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanatarnĂŒro|gokishanatarnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanatarnĂŒmu|shanatarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanatarnknĂŒmu|goshanatarnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanatarnĂŒmu|gokishanatarnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanatarshĂ«nĂŒ|shanatarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanatarnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanatarnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanatarshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanatarshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanatarshĂ«ro|shanatarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanatarnkshĂ«ro|goshanatarnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanatarshĂ«ro|gokishanatarshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanatarshĂ«mu|shanatarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanatarnkshĂ«mu|goshanatarnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanatarshĂ«mu|gokishanatarshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanataronĂŒ|shanataronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanatarnkronĂŒ|goshanatarnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanataronĂŒ|gokishanataronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanataroshĂ«|shanataroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanatarnkroshĂ«|goshanatarnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanataroshĂ«|gokishanataroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanataromu|shanataromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanatarnkromu|goshanatarnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanataromu|gokishanataromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanatarmunĂŒ|shanatarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanatarnkmunĂŒ|goshanatarnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanatarmunĂŒ|gokishanatarmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanatarmushĂ«|shanatarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanatarnkmushĂ«|goshanatarnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanatarmushĂ«|gokishanatarmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanatarmuro|shanatarmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanatarnkmuro|goshanatarnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanatarmuro|gokishanatarmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
